sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value1 FLOAT, value2 FLOAT, str_value VARCHAR);

SELECT id, atan2(value1, value2) AS angle, str_value, (32 | (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data WHERE str_value LIKE 'A%')) AS bitwise_result FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL OR str_value IS NULL GROUP BY id, str_value HAVING angle > 0;
SELECT id, str_value, (atan2(NULLIF(value1, 0), value2) | 1) AS complex_operation FROM test_data ORDER BY complex_operation DESC;
CREATE TABLE temp_data AS SELECT id, (atan2(value1, value2) * 180 / PI()) AS angle_degrees FROM test_data WHERE value1 IS NOT NULL;
SELECT angle_degrees, (angle_degrees | 3) AS modified_angle FROM temp_data WHERE angle_degrees IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (value1 | CAST(str_value AS INTEGER)) AS bitwise_casting FROM test_data WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, (SELECT atan2(MAX(value1), SUM(value2)) FROM test_data) AS global_angle FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE str_value IS NOT NULL) HAVING global_angle > 0;
SELECT id, ((atan2(value1, value2) + 2) | 255) AS result_num FROM test_data WHERE (value1 IS NOT NULL OR value2 IS NOT NULL);
